title.notes: Extracted from window.product_json display_name field. Matches JSON-LD Product.name and page title pattern.

price.expected: Current selling price in USD format
price.notes: Extracted from window.product_json list_price_min field using format_usd_price(). Correctly avoids BFX currency conversion by using server-rendered JSON.

availability.notes: Derived from max_per_cart > 0 in product_json. Logic is sound — max_per_cart of 0 or null means Out of Stock.

original_price.notes: Extracted from window.product_json msrp_min. Correctly only populated when MSRP ($335.00) > list_price ($139.99). Product is 58% off.

currency.notes: Hardcoded as USD per product_analysis. Correct for Gilt's primary market.

url.notes: Tracking parameters correctly stripped (campaignid, adgroupid, adposition removed).

src_url.notes: src_url equals url since input URLs are individual product URLs, not listing pages. This is correct behavior.

location.notes: Empty string is correct — Gilt is online-only, no physical store locations per product_analysis.

status_code.notes: Set to 200 for successful page load (product_json extracted successfully).

scraped_at.notes: Valid ISO-8601 UTC timestamp with microseconds. Recent time at extraction moment.

remarks.notes: Correctly flags is_final_sale from product_json. Useful metadata for buyers.

brand.notes: Extracted from window.product_json brand field. Matches JSON-LD brand.name and page title.

sku.notes: Extracted from product_json skus[0].sku_number. Valid numeric SKU.

description.expected: Product features text, cleaned of HTML
description.notes: 563 characters of clean text with product details (frame shape, lens color, dimensions, materials). HTML properly stripped via clean_html(). Not truncated.

images.notes: All 3 images are from ruecdn.com (product CDN), all HTTPS, all contain SKU code (1111632272) in path. Scoped to .pdp-layout__images-container. No banners/nav/emoji images captured.

edge_case_results.notes: Product is on sale: price $139.99 vs MSRP $335.00 (58% off). original_price correctly populated with MSRP. is_final_sale flag correctly noted in remarks.

architectural_highlights.bfx_avoidance: Scraper correctly uses product_json values instead of CSS selectors to avoid Borderfree currency conversion
architectural_highlights.synchronous_polling: Uses synchronous execute_script polling (not async) to avoid ChromeDriver 149 crash
architectural_highlights.no_proxy_default: Direct connection works for this site — residential proxy is NOT needed and causes failures
architectural_highlights.fallback_chain: product_json -> JSON-LD -> DOM regex scanning (multi-layer fallback)
architectural_highlights.uc_mode: SeleniumBase UC Mode successfully bypasses Gilt's custom anti-bot protection

feedback_for_writer.summary: No issues found. Scraper extracts all fields correctly from window.product_json with proper fallback chain.
strengths: Excellent use of window.product_json as primary data source — avoids BFX currency conversion entirely
Synchronous polling pattern avoids ChromeDriver async crash bug
Proper image scoping to .pdp-layout__images-container prevents banner/nav image capture
Multi-layer fallback (product_json -> JSON-LD -> DOM regex) provides robustness
Availability logic using max_per_cart is creative and effective
Correct handling of original_price — only populated when MSRP > sale price
limitations_noted: Only 1 sample product available for testing (input_urls.json has 1 URL)
src_url equals url since inputs are individual product URLs — this is correct behavior for this input format
No out-of-stock product tested (only in-stock sample available)
